name: Midori Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs and melted butter. Press into a spring form pan to cover the bottom and sides partially.
2. For the filling: Let cream cheese soften in a large bowl. Blend in sugar and salt, beating until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, blending well after each egg. Beat in Midori liqueur. Pour mixture over the crumb crust.
3. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until firm in center. Let cool for 15 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 450°F. For topping: Combine sour cream, sugar, and Midori liqueur. Pour onto the cake.
5. Bake another 10 minutes.
6. For glaze: Dissolve gelatin in boiling water, then let cool until syrupy. Place melon balls on top of the cake and pour glaze over.
7. Refrigerate before serving.
